name: Polie count model — proves polie counts on a NON-par-3 (unlike greenie). Each polie is 1 team point; all four players could have one. All nets = par so base points are 0 — the ledger reflects POLIE points only. (Story 2.4a: config + holes + expected are byte-identical to the 2.3 fixture; only this doc text was updated when the bogey-or-better gate was removed.)
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the F1 polie modifier (Story 2.3 count; gate removed Story 2.4a). Polie is a per-player CLAIM (a made putt/chip longer than the flagstick) the scorer checks — accepted as entered (FR16), never software-detected. PURE COUNT, STATELESS: poliePointsA = (# teamA polies) − (# teamB polies), range −2..+2, each unit a team point (+1 each winner-team player / −1 each opponent). A checked polie ALWAYS counts (no eligibility gate; gross unread). SettlementEdge IR = post-Story-2.1a WHOLE-DOLLAR 1-to-1 layout. Integer cents; fromPlayerId PAYS toPlayerId.
_handCalc:
Teams A={a1,a2} B={b1,b2}, flat $5/point, net-skins ON (0 here), polie ON, gate OFF. Every net = par => all base points 0. POLIE per hole (gate off ⇒ every checked polie eligible):
  H1 (par4): a1 polie => countA=1 countB=0 => +1 (polie on a PAR-4, not par-3 restricted).
  H2 (par5): a1+a2 polie => countA=2 => +2 (both teammates).
  H3 (par3): b1 polie => countB=1 => −1.
  H4 (par4): a1+b1 polie => countA=1 countB=1 => 0 (contested — nets out).
Round polieA = +1+2−1+0 = +2. Each cross pair += pts*(pv/2): only the net per-hole pts matter; total A points = +2 => each A player +2*500 = +1000c (+$10), each B −1000c. Zero-sum.
EDGES (1-to-1): b1->a1 1000, b2->a2 1000. ledgerTotal = 2000c.
ORDER-INDEPENDENCE: the golden test recomputes with holes reversed and asserts byte-identical (polie is stateless).
